query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A pair of wooden park benches face each other across a cylindrical trash receptacle on a path dusted with snow. To the right, a tall tree with bare branches extends upward. Dense fog obscures the background, leaving a uniform pale gray backdrop beyond the visible foreground elements.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two empty park benches and a trash can sit on a snow-dusted path near a leafless tree, nearly consumed by enveloping fog. The photograph exhibits a muted, faded palette drained of vibrancy, alongside oppressively low contrast that crushes midtones and flattens tonal variation into a suffocating gray expanse. The empty, isolated composition and heavy atmosphere convey atmospheric distress, evoking melancholy and quiet unease.
